_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: human NF1−/− Schwann cell lines showed primarily additivity with synergy scores ranging from 5.106 to 9.724 and 2.885 to 7.294 for the ipNF05.5 and ipNF95.6s, respectively
details: Showed primarily additivity with synergy scores ranging from 2.885 to 7.294 for abemaciclib and LY3214996 combination
